posts.author: Gupta
posts.community: Sugar Cycles: 7-8 years of losses followed by 2-3 years of super gains!
posts.text: Where does international sugar and molasses prices stand vs Indian prices? At 14cents, it is equivalent to 31 Rs/kg, which is much lower to 42-44Rs/kg price at wholesale. Same must be the case for B-molasses. Unless international prices improves, do Indian mills have case of increase in profitability?

posts.author: Rishab_Agarwal
posts.community: Sugar Cycles: 7-8 years of losses followed by 2-3 years of super gains!
